error.generic: Something unexpected happened. Please try again later.

code.AI_AUTH_FAILED: Authentication failed. Please check your key settings.
code.AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: Please configure your AI service in Settings.
code.AI_RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again later.
code.CONFLICT: Conflict detected. Please refresh and try again.
code.CONTEXT_BACKPRESSURE: Context service is busy. Please try later.
code.CONTEXT_INPUT_TOO_LARGE: Input is too long. Please shorten it.
code.CONTEXT_INSPECT_FORBIDDEN: No permission to view this context.
code.DB_ERROR: Data storage error. Please try again.
code.DOCUMENT_SAVE_CONFLICT: Save conflict. Please refresh and try again.
code.DOCUMENT_SIZE_EXCEEDED: Document size exceeds the 5 MB limit.
code.INTERNAL: Internal error. Please try again later.
code.INTERNAL_ERROR: Internal error. Please try again later.
code.IO_ERROR: Read/write operation failed. Please try again.
code.IPC_CHANNEL_FORBIDDEN: This channel does not allow the operation.
code.LLM_API_ERROR: AI service error. Please try again later.
code.MEMORY_BACKPRESSURE: Memory service is busy. Please try later.
code.MEMORY_SCOPE_DENIED: No permission to access this memory.
code.MODEL_NOT_READY: Model is not ready. Please try again later.
code.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
code.PROJECT_DELETE_REQUIRES_ARCHIVE: Please archive the project before deleting.
code.PROJECT_SWITCH_TIMEOUT: Project switch timed out. Please retry.
code.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again later.
code.SEARCH_BACKPRESSURE: Search service is busy. Please try later.
code.SEARCH_DATA_CORRUPTED: Search data needs to be rebuilt.
code.SEARCH_PROJECT_FORBIDDEN: No permission to search this project.
code.SEARCH_TIMEOUT: Search timed out. Please try again.
code.SKILL_INPUT_EMPTY: Please enter content before using this skill.
code.SKILL_OUTPUT_INVALID: AI output was invalid. Please try again.
code.SKILL_QUEUE_OVERFLOW: Skill queue is full. Please try later.
code.TIMEOUT: Operation timed out. Please try again later.
code.UPSTREAM_ERROR: Upstream service error. Please try later.
code.VERSION_DIFF_PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE: Version diff data is too large.
code.VERSION_MERGE_TIMEOUT: Version merge timed out. Please retry.

toast.title: Unexpected system error
toast.description: Some features may be affected. Please retry the operation. If the problem persists, restart the app.
